---
title: "Proposal"
---

## Research Question
As NAFLD fibrosis stage increases, do liver gene expression patterns show increased extracellular matrix organization and tissue remodeling?

## Dataset
- Public dataset: GEO GSE135251
- Organism: Human
- Tissue: Liver biopsy
- Data type: RNA-seq raw counts
- Sample size: 216 patients


## Planned Analysis
- Clean and match metadata with raw count data
- Filter low-count genes
- Normalize RNA-seq counts using DESeq2
- Perform exploratory analysis and quality control
- Use PCA to examine sample clustering by fibrosis stage
- Perform differential expression analysis between fibrosis groups
- Visualize results using:
        - PCA plot
        - Volcano plot
        - Heatmap
        - Top upregulated and downregulated gene plots
- Perform Gene Ontology enrichment analysis using clusterProfiler
- Interpret whether ECM-related genes and pathways increase with fibrosis stage


## Deliverables
- Quarto website
- Abstract
- Introduction with citations
- Methods and pipeline diagram
- Results section with figures and interpretations
- Discussion and synthesis
- Limitations
- Future work
- References/bibliography
